# core-v1_conversation_history (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `chat_id` (String) The ID of the requested chat

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Time when the conversation was created
- `id` (String) Conversation ID
- `last_updated` (String) Time when the conversation was last updated
- `message_count` (Number) Number of messages in the conversation
- `messages` (Attributes List) List of messages in the conversation (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--messages))
- `name` (String) Conversation name

<a id="nestedatt--messages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `messages`

Read-Only:

- `role` (String)
- `type` (Number)
- `value` (Attributes) The content of the message returned from ai (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--messages--value))

<a id="nestedatt--messages--value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `messages.value`
